name: mojo-getitem-slice-multidim
description: Pattern for extending a rank-restricted Mojo __getitem__(Slice) to support N-D tensors with axis-0 semantics. Use when: (1) a Mojo tensor method raises an error for non-1D input but the logic generalises, (2) you need NumPy-style single-slice axis-0 indexing on multi-dimensional tensors, (3) you need to preserve step/reverse slicing across tensor ranks.
